title: CronJob — Jobs history limits
text:
The
.spec.successfulJobsHistoryLimit
and
.spec.failedJobsHistoryLimit
fields specify
how many completed and failed Jobs should be kept. Both fields are optional.
.spec.successfulJobsHistoryLimit
: This field specifies the number of successful finished
jobs to keep. The default value is
3
. Setting this field to
0
will not keep any successful jobs.
.spec.failedJobsHistoryLimit
: This field specifies the number of failed finished jobs to keep.
The default value is
1
. Setting this field to
0
will not keep any failed jobs.
.spec.successfulJobsHistoryLimit
: This field specifies the number of successful finished
jobs to keep. The default value is
3
. Setting this field to
0
will not keep any successful jobs.
.spec.failedJobsHistoryLimit
: This field specifies the number of failed finished jobs to keep.
The default value is
1
. Setting this field to
0
will not keep any failed jobs.
For another way to clean up Jobs automatically, see
Clean up finished Jobs automatically
.
